title: astragalus rassoulii
intro: Astragalus rassoulii, also known as the Rassouli's milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of Iran. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus rassoulii include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and reduce stress and anxiety. Astragalus rassoulii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
